name: Malika - Sleeping Neighbour
description:
Uh-oh! You accidentally got inside the house of your neighbor and locked yourself inside. You have to reach for your chance for escape, without any noise... or should you? Perhaps while you here, you can have some fun?

This is my bot, which i made under inspiration of Nii-cri's MILF Next Door - Saeko & The Room. I wanted to experiment and create a bot with some mechanics. I hope you guys would find it at least interesting. Cause i use something special, to make it's worth for you.
Also this is going to be experimented with stat mechanics, so i am gonna put this in tag. I used Kataru's prompt on messages but customized to make it more suitable for thing i want to pull. Also
Warning - this bot my have unpleasant themes, such as rape, non-consensual activities, somnophilia, violence and etc. You can proceed with vanilla or become a very bad person. Up to you.

P.S. I may edit this bot from time to time. If there are some errors or inconveniences, let me know in reviews and comments
creator: Facio
